name: Kenny Werner
description: American jazz pianist, composer, and author
abstract: Kenny Werner (born November 19, 1951) is an American jazz pianist, composer, and author.

about_quotes.speaker: Ray Drummond
about_quotes.evidence: For a time Billy Hart and I used to play together in Kenny’s trio
about_quotes.doc_title: Ray Drummond interviewed by Monk Rowe, Toronto, Canada, January 9, 2003

about_quotes.speaker: Tim Ries
about_quotes.evidence: he wasn’t even leading the thing it was like he was a side person like myself but so it was like really a great combination of people: Gary Bartz, Christian McBride, Kenny Werner
about_quotes.doc_title: Tim Ries interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, March 19, 2022

about_quotes.speaker: Tony Marino
about_quotes.evidence: when we started with her she ended up getting Kenny Werner to do musical arrangements for her... We had synthesizer... drums... Well we played with Jamey Haddad... Jamey and I played with her
about_quotes.doc_title: Tony Marino interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, August 25, 2025

about_quotes.speaker: Maria Schneider
about_quotes.evidence: I know Kenny Werner uses things, and he turns things upside down and tries all different combinations of things and he writes beautiful music.
about_quotes.doc_title: Maria Schneider interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 12, 2001

about_quotes.speaker: David Torkanowsky
about_quotes.evidence: I mean Kenny Werner, Richie Beirach, you know, all these cats have come up with new harmonic approaches and I try to at least allude to that.
about_quotes.doc_title: David Torkanowsky interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Hartford, New York, September 26, 2019
